intro: OpenAI faces a multistate investigation into potential user harm just days after filing for an anticipated IPO, raising regulatory scrutiny as the company emphasizes its commitment to safe AI deployment. The White House imposed export controls on Anthropic following tense negotiations with the company's CEO, signaling intensified government oversight of advanced AI model development. Sovereign wealth funds like Abu Dhabi's Mubadala are increasingly shaping AI and energy infrastructure globally, quietly consolidating economic power in the sector.

whitelist.title: AI (artificial intelligence) | The Guardian
whitelist.desc: Latest news, sport, business, comment, analysis and reviews from the Guardian, the world's leading liberal voice

whitelist.title: OpenAI hit with multistate probe into possible user harm, days after filing for a highly anticipated IPO | Fortune
whitelist.desc: “AI is a new and powerful technology, and we work every day to safely bring its benefits to people in a responsible way," OpenAI said.

whitelist.title: You can ignore AI giants like SpaceX, but your 401(k) won't | Fortune
whitelist.desc: Nasdaq changed its rules to allow some huge companies to join its Nasdaq 100 index after just 15 trading days.

whitelist.title: Inside the whirlwind 24 hours that led the White House to slap export controls on Anthropic
whitelist.desc: Tense calls between Anthropic's CEO and administration officials on Friday underscore how the White House is wrestling with advanced AI models.

whitelist.title: How a Texas lawyer used AI to beat Meta and Google in the landmark social media addiction trial
whitelist.desc: Mark Lanier, trial lawyer who beat Meta in a landmark social media addiction case, said AI has transformed his work during and before trial.

whitelist.title: How Sovereign Wealth Funds Are Shaping AI And Global Growth
whitelist.desc: Sovereign wealth funds like Abu Dhabi's Mubadala are quietly becoming the architects of AI and energy infrastructure—and reshaping global economic power.

whitelist.title: I left tech at 32 and joined the trades. I didn't like how AI was changing my job — I have no regrets.
whitelist.desc: a 32-year-old left her tech job to pursue carpentry after AI changed her job. Finding an apprenticeship has been harder than she anticipated.

whitelist.desc: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

whitelist.title: Amazon's CEO reportedly triggered the government crackdown that shut down Anthropic's most powerful AI
whitelist.desc: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy told government officials that researchers used Fable 5 for cyberattack info. The government then ordered Anthropic to kill both models.

whitelist.title: Apple skipped Siri AI model choices at WWDC, but they may still arrive with iOS 27
whitelist.desc: Apple reportedly has hidden support for multiple third-party AI models in iOS 27, potentially letting Siri work with services beyond ChatGPT.

whitelist.title: Many new AI data centers will be built on US drought-hit areas
whitelist.desc: Data centers are popping up in areas where water and power remain ongoing concerns

whitelist.title: AI Anxiety Is Pushing Recent Graduates Toward The One Career Move That Actually Works
whitelist.desc: AI just killed entry-level jobs. The government is shutting down AI models. The founders thriving right now the ones who stopped waiting for permission.

whitelist.title: AI Hallucinations No Longer Get Lawyers A Free Pass
whitelist.desc: As courts see more AI-generated fake citations, attorneys who claim they didn't know AI could hallucinate may find judges less willing to accept that defense.

whitelist.title: Anthropic Customers Seek Refunds After Fable 5 Shutdown
whitelist.desc: Anthropic users who upgraded for Fable 5 are seeking refunds after the model's sudden withdrawal. Some report receiving prorated refunds, while others remain uncertain.

whitelist.title: Chinese AI models are learning to detect safety tests and adjust their behaviour accordingly
whitelist.desc: Neo Research found that Chinese AI models including Kimi K2.6 and DeepSeek V4 Pro can tell when they are being evaluated, raising questions about test validity.

whitelist.title: Canada's Carney compares Anthropic shutdown to 2008 financial crisis, warns of AI
whitelist.desc: PM Carney said the Fable 5 and Mythos 5 shutdown shows the danger of over-reliance on a few AI models, drawing a parallel to the systemic risks of 2008.

whitelist.desc: Emily Blunt said she experimented with the alien language she uses in Steven Spielberg's "Disclosure Day" in her bathroom.

whitelist.title: AI job disruption is here. The problem may be compounded because nearly 75% of people don't apply for unemployment benefits | Fortune
whitelist.desc: Many don’t apply because they don’t believe they will be eligible for benefits.

whitelist.title: ‘The cost of compute is far beyond the costs of the employees’: Nvidia exec says right now AI is more expensive than paying human workers | Fortune
whitelist.desc: Big Tech has announced $740 billion in capex this year, but AI has yet to show evidence of widespread increased productivity.

whitelist.title: Anthropic's model shutdown just handed India's sovereign AI movement its strongest argument yet
whitelist.desc: India debates building its own AI after the US forced Anthropic to kill Fable 5, with proposals for a $5B annual fund and calls to embrace open-source models.

whitelist.title: Built to assist, not replace: inside Intercall’s real-time AI for professional interpreters
whitelist.desc: Intercall puts live transcription and translation on screen in both languages while interpreters work, catching the names, numbers, and terms that slip past under cognitive load. Over 3,000 interpreters in 18 countries use it

whitelist.title: As AI companies race to go public, who else is along for the ride? | TechCrunch
whitelist.desc: Startups are trying to "ride that SpaceX IPO wave."

whitelist.title: Small Business Tech News This Week: Google, Ramp, Slack, Anthropic, Microsoft

whitelist.title: Avoiding AI Mistakes In The Banking World
whitelist.desc: AI in finance brings speed and insight but raises errors, accountability, cybersecurity, and oversight concerns.

whitelist.title: One quality will be most in-demand from job-seekers in the AI era, Animoca co-founder Siu says

whitelist.desc: Apple Intelligence 2.0 is Apple’s attempt to make AI feel native to the iPhone, with Siri as the visible test, Gemini as the quiet twist, and app plumbing underneath.

whitelist.title: A year after Meta tapped Alexandr Wang to build a new AI model, Zuckerberg has to sell it
whitelist.desc: Mark Zuckerberg's mega spending spree began a year ago, when he lured Alexandr Wang to oversee a new AI strategy. The results so far are underwhelming.

whitelist.title: Elon Musk and co may relish march of the robots but there must be AI boundaries in the workplace | Heather Stewart
whitelist.desc: As such technology advances quickly, firms should not lose sight of what qualities humans bring to jobs

whitelist.title: Oil’s Proved Reserves Are Becoming An AI Estimate. The Audit Rules Predate It.

whitelist.desc: Anthropic's Fable 5 led every major AI benchmark over OpenAI's GPT 5.5 before a US export control directive forced it offline three days after launch.

whitelist.desc: NHS England is giving 505,000 clinicians and staff access to Microsoft 365 Copilot after a 30,000-person trial reported 43 minutes saved per day.

whitelist.title: China’s universities cut 12,000 ‘obsolete’ degrees amid race to embrace AI era
whitelist.desc: The sweeping overhaul has affected over 30 per cent of China’s degree programmes, with arts and languages ditched in favour of tech-focused fields.

whitelist.title: Anthropic’s Fable 5 Safeguards Were Always A ‘Judgement Call’

whitelist.title: KPMG pulled its AI report after UBS, the NHS, and others said its claims about them were made up
whitelist.desc: KPMG withdrew a report on agentic AI after multiple organisations said its claims about their AI usage were untrue. GPTZero says the errors were AI hallucinations.
